ruleset.name: JUnit Rules (JavaTddPlugin version)
ruleset.description: These rules deal with different problems that can occur with JUnit tests. This version of the ruleset includes alternate messages from the main PMD rulesets/java/design.xml ruleset.

rule.name: JUnitStaticSuite
rule.message: You have a suite() method that is not both public and static, so JUnit won't call it to get your TestSuite. Is that what you wanted to do?

rule.name: JUnitSpelling
rule.message: You may have misspelled a JUnit framework method (setUp() or tearDown()). Double-check your capitalization.

rule.name: UnitTestShouldIncludeAssert
rule.message: This unit test should include assert() or fail()

rule.name: TestClassWithoutTestCases
rule.message: The class ''{0}'' might be a test class, but it contains no test cases.
